name: The Magistrate
tagline: Due process is a convenience. Mine.

mythic_signature.description: Cannot be sent to Holding, ever — by the player, by the AI, by raids. When cops sweep active tops into Lockup during a raid, The Magistrate is excluded. The Magistrate does not know fear of the state.
mythic_signature.balance_note: Heavy defensive role. R 9 is a wall. The anti-raid insurance is massive in late-game when heat naturally escalates. Particularly strong in Nightmare / Ultra-Nightmare where Lockup is permanent.
